Class Aircraft

java.lang.Object
com.example.airlinereervationsystem.models.Aircraft
public class Aircraft extends Object
Represents an Aircraft entity in the Airline Reservation System. This class encapsulates the physical attributes of an airplane, including its unique database ID, model identification, and maximum passenger capacity.

OOP Concepts Demonstrated:

  • Encapsulation: All class attributes are strictly defined as private to protect data integrity, exposing control only via public getters and setters.
Version:
2.0 (Sprint 2)
Author:
Donia Ahmed

  • Constructor Details

    • Aircraft

      public Aircraft(int aircraftId, String aircraftModel, int totalCapacity)
      Constructs a new Aircraft instance with specified structural and operational details.
      Parameters:
      aircraftId - the unique identifier for the aircraft in the database
      aircraftModel - the commercial or technical model name (e.g., "Boeing 737")
      totalCapacity - the maximum number of passenger seats available on board

  • Method Details

    • getAircraftId

      public int getAircraftId()
      Gets the unique aircraft ID.
      Returns:
      the integer aircraft ID

    • setAircraftId

      public void setAircraftId(int aircraftId)
      Sets the unique aircraft ID.
      Parameters:
      aircraftId - the new aircraft ID to set

    • getAircraftModel

      public String getAircraftModel()
      Gets the commercial model name of the aircraft.
      Returns:
      the string representing aircraft model

    • setAircraftModel

      public void setAircraftModel(String aircraftModel)
      Sets the commercial model name of the aircraft.
      Parameters:
      aircraftModel - the new aircraft model to set

    • getTotalCapacity

      public int getTotalCapacity()
      Gets the total seat capacity of the aircraft.
      Returns:
      the maximum passenger capacity

    • setTotalCapacity

      public void setTotalCapacity(int totalCapacity)
      Sets the total seat capacity of the aircraft.
      Parameters:
      totalCapacity - the new passenger capacity to set
